aka: ＢＳ世界のドキュメンタリー「セクストーション　新手のネット性犯罪を暴く」(日)

cast.name: 乔丹·斯蒂芬斯 Jordan Stephens

trans_title: ＢＳ世界のドキュメンタリー「セクストーション　新手のネット性犯罪を暴く」(日)
introduction: Musician turned dynamic presenter Jordan Stephens carries out a bold investigation into the rise of sextortion scams targeting young people online.Sextortion is one of the fastest-growing online crimes, and thousands of young people are falling victim. In this fearless investigative documentary, Jordan Stephens puts himself in harm’s way to expose how sextortion scammers operate, going so far as to get himself deliberately sextorted on camera.As he poses as a target online, Jordan uncovers how fraudsters lure young victims into sending explicit photos and then blackmail them with threats to expose those images unless money is paid. The emotional toll on victims is devastating, and many suffer in silence, unable to tell their families or ask for help.In a dramatic twist, Jordan identifies his scammer and sets out on a journey to confront them directly. With gripping access and emotional honesty, Hunting My Sextortion Scammer sheds urgent light on a disturbing and fast-growing online crime wave affecting boys and young men across the UK.
